title: The Strange Love of Molly Louvain
writer: Maurine Dallas Watkins, Erwin Gelsey, Brown Holmes
actors: Ann Dvorak, Lee Tracy, Richard Cromwell
plot: Molly Louvain's plans for a respectable marriage with her sweetheart Ralph fall through so she takes to the road with a two-bit crook and becomes wanted by the police in connection with a high-profile crime.
